title: SMTRI Protocol for Experimental Procedures
author: XIAO, Huan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Predictions.docx: Performance comparisons among SMTRI, XGBoost, NB, and RFSMMA. SM_Properties.csv: The properties of RNA motif-targeted small molecules used in this study (RNALigands). XGBoost.joblib: The best saved model of XGBoost. NB.joblib: The best saved model of NB. RFSMMA.joblib: The best saved model of RFSMMA. best_DNN_model.h5: The best saved model of SMTRI. RNALigands_training_set.csv: featured training set. PDB_testing_set.csv: featured PDB testing set. PubChem_testing_set.csv: featured PubChem testing set. RPocket_testing_set.csv: featured RPocket testing set. PDB.csv: PDB RNA motif-SM interactions. PubChem.csv: PubChem RNA motif-SM interactions. RPocket.csv: RPocket RNA motif-SM interactions.
